Manage business travel and expense with ease.

Get started
Watch a demo video
Go to Navan →
Trusted by thousands of companies
The AI-powered business travel and expense platform
From team offsites to deal-closing dinners, make business travel effortless for frequent travelers while maintaining control over spend.
Unrivaled visibility,
control, and savings
Navan Travel
One-Stop Shop
Build, manage, and scale your company’s travel program with ease. Empower employees to book from an extensive inventory while staying within your spending limits.
Learn more about Navan Travel
Your browser does not support the video tag.
Navan Expense
Centralized Spend
Streamline your expense management from swipe to reconciliation. Automate categorization, reports, and reimbursements. Boost productivity and optimize savings with AI-powered insights.
Learn more about Navan Expense
Your browser does not support the video tag.
Pay Your Way
Payments
Optimize your T&E program for control and efficiency, no matter how your teams spend. Leverage Navan corporate cards, Navan Connect (compatible with Visa, Mastercard, and American Express corporate cards), and reimbursements for spending on personal cards.
Navan Connect partners with:
Your browser does not support the video tag.
Introducing Navan Edge
Make work trips worth it
The new standard is here. Navan Edge is the personal assistant for frequent travelers that makes booking and managing flights, hotels, and dining effortless.
Learn more

Sky-high company savings
Intelligent corporate travel management that can drive real savings
1
More options, more deals
Navan provides your team with special rates among a massive travel inventory featuring top suppliers.
2
Spend guardrails
Custom policies let your employees book and spend as needed while protecting the company budget.
3
Navan Rewards
Reward employees when they book travel below budget — at no cost to you.
Proud to partner with
Industry-leading technology with a personal touch
Tackle travel on your own
Now your employees can book, update, or cancel bookings on their own—all with a tap of a button.
Or let our experts handle it
Our experts are ready 24/7 to solve any travel crisis. Want a premium, high-touch service for your travel needs? Our seasoned Reed & Mackay are available with Navan Pro.
From small businesses to global enterprises —
all companies save with Navan

About Navan
Navan is the global AI-powered
business travel
and
expense management platform
that makes travel easy for frequent travelers. powering travel programs at more than 10,000 companies, including
Canva
,
HelloFresh
, DoorDash,
Duolingo
, and Steelcase. The platform simplifies travel, payments, and expense management with intuitive tools for booking, automated payments with built-in virtual cards, and seamless expense reporting. Navan delivers
exceptional customer satisfaction
, with a 96% CSAT and 43 NPS. Founded in 2015 by Ariel Cohen and Ilan Twig as TripActions, Navan reported $613M in LTM revenue and $7.6B in LTM gross booking volume, each for the twelve months ended July 31, 2025. The company aims to empower organizations worldwide to make corporate travel smarter and more efficient. Learn more at
navan.com
.

"Booking through Navan makes our lives easier while saving the company money"
Amanda Kim
Commercial accountant
Frequently Asked Questions
What’s the difference between Navan Business and Navan Enterprise?
Navan Business and Navan Enterprise both have all the travel and expense features companies love. In addition, Navan Enterprise offers support features to help with implementing and scaling the platform.
Does the Navan Business price change after a certain amount of trips?
As long as your company has 300 or fewer employees, there is no limit to how many trips you can book with Navan Travel. Navan Expense is free for the first 5 monthly expensing users, and then is $15 per user per month. If your company has more than 300 employees, request a demo to learn more.
What is an expensing user?
An active expense user is anyone who submits a transaction into Navan expense by manual transaction or Navan Connect.
Is Navan only for booking flights?
No, travelers can book flights, hotels, car rentals, and trains on Navan. Our global inventory provides a wide variety of options so travelers can book the perfect itinerary.
Why is it free for companies of up to 300 employees to use Navan Business?
Navan is powered by travel providers’ commission fees—so you get access to a huge inventory without any cost to you.
How secure is Navan?
The security of our customer’s data is our top priority. We use advanced security measures to preserve the integrity and privacy of your data, and adhere to strict data protection laws. We are committed to keeping your data safe. You can always access our
privacy policy
and our
security protocol
.
Do you have a mobile app?
Yes. The Navan mobile app is the perfect trip companion for traveling and/or expensing employees.

will take your company

Opt-Out Request Honored
Privacy Preference Center
We value your privacy. We use cookies for a variety of purposes including advertising and to learn about how you interact on our website. Some of these cookies are considered a “sale” and “sharing” under the California Privacy Rights Act (CPRA) or targeted advertising. As such, you can opt-out of third party advertising and tracking cookies that are not considered service providers by turning off these cookies below or by broadcasting the global privacy control signal on a browser/extension that supports it. 

Please note that if you visit our website from a different computer or device or clear your cookies from your browser, you will need to provide your preferences again.
Allow All
Manage Consent Preferences
Strictly Necessary Cookies
Always Active
These strictly necessary cookies allow you access to our website and services, applications, and tools. They are used for essential purposes such as identifying irregular website behavior, preventing fraudulent activity and improving security.
Sale of Personal Data
Sale of Personal Data
Under the California Consumer Privacy Act, you have the right to opt-out of the sale of your personal information to third parties. These cookies collect information for analytics and to personalize your experience with targeted ads. You may exercise your right to opt out of the sale of personal information by using this toggle switch.
                If you opt out we will not be able to offer you personalised ads and will not hand over your personal information to any third parties. Additionally, you may contact our legal department for further clarification about your rights as a California consumer by using this Exercise My Rights link. If you have enabled privacy controls on your browser (such as a plugin), we have to take that as a valid request to opt-out. Therefore we would not be able to track your activity through the web. This may affect our ability to personalize ads according to your preferences.
Targeting Cookies
Switch Label
label
These cookies allow us to deliver content, including ads relevant to your interests, on our website/services or on third-party sites.
Analytics Cookies
Analytics Cookies
Analytics cookies collect information about your use of the Site and enable us to improve the way it works. For example, analytics cookies show us which are the most frequently visited pages on the Site, help us record any difficulties you have with the Site, and show us whether our advertising is effective or not. This allows us to see the overall patterns of usage on the Site, rather than the usage of a single person. We use the information to analyze Site traffic, but we do not examine this information for individually identifying information.
Performance Cookies
Performance Cookies
These cookies help us assess the performance of our website and services, including as part of our analytics practices to help us understand how individuals use the website/services.
Functional Cookies
Functional Cookies
These cookies allow us to offer you enhanced functionality when using the website and services. The cookies collect information about your choices and preferences and allow us to remember language or other local settings and customize the Site accordingly.

About Navan
Navan is the global AI-powered
business travel
and
expense management platform
that makes travel easy for frequent travelers. powering travel programs at more than 10,000 companies, including
Canva
,
HelloFresh
, DoorDash,
Duolingo
, and Steelcase. The platform simplifies travel, payments, and expense management with intuitive tools for booking, automated payments with built-in virtual cards, and seamless expense reporting. Navan delivers
exceptional customer satisfaction
, with a 96% CSAT and 43 NPS. Founded in 2015 by Ariel Cohen and Ilan Twig as TripActions, Navan reported $613M in LTM revenue and $7.6B in LTM gross booking volume, each for the twelve months ended July 31, 2025. The company aims to empower organizations worldwide to make corporate travel smarter and more efficient. Learn more at
navan.com
.

Connect your business with Navan integrations
Navan connects naturally with the systems your business already uses. Bring all your data and workflows together for a smooth, unified experience — it’s all simple and seamless with Navan.

Accounting and Finance
Unlock efficiency through Navan’s integrations
When your tools work together, updates sync seamlessly across systems, manual tasks are minimized, and you spend less time switching between platforms. The result: faster workflows, cleaner data, and more time to focus on strategies to move your business forward.
Get started
Integration options: direct connections, SFTP, and Navan APIs
Navan offers a range of integration options — including direct connections, SFTP, and robust APIs — allowing you to connect to your existing systems in the way that works best for you. Our integrations are easy to implement, require minimal time to implement, and provide a native way to ingest information.

Senior Manager, Accounts Payable

Frequently Asked Questions
What integration options does Navan offer?
Navan supports a variety of integration methods to connect with your existing systems — including plug-and-play, no-code integrations, SFTP, and the Navan API for custom solutions. Many integrations can be set up in minutes, directly from the Navan dashboard. For more advanced requirements, the Navan API enables your team to create tailored workflows. Our team is also available to assist with custom ERP integration development or project management at an additional cost.
What types of integrations does Navan offer?
Navan offers a range of integration options to ensure seamless connectivity with your existing systems. We provide direct, pre-built integrations with popular platforms for accounting, HR, security, and more. For universal integrations, SFTP integrations are available — ideal for custom HR fields. For greater flexibility, the Navan API empowers you to build custom workflows and integrations that fit your exact needs. Available integration methods and specific platform support may vary depending on your systems.
What HR integration options do I have with Navan?
Navan supports HR integrations through SCIM, SFTP, and direct connections to leading HR platforms, making it easy to sync employee data in the way that works best for your organization.
What SSO options does Navan support?
Navan offers secure single sign-on (SSO) integrations with Okta, Azure, SAML 2.0, and OpenID, providing you with flexibility to match your company’s security setup.
How can I integrate my ERP system with Navan?
Navan integrates with ERP systems like NetSuite through direct integrations, as well as via our expense API and SFTP for expense data transfer. Need something more custom? Our team can help develop or manage ERP integrations tailored to your requirements. Choose the method that best fits your company’s workflows.
What kind of data syncs between Navan and my other systems?
The type of data depends on the integration. For accounting and ERP systems, you can sync transaction data, expense details, general ledger (GL) codes, and reimbursement information. For human resource information system (HRIS) platforms, you can automate user provisioning by syncing employee profiles, department data, and user roles. Security integrations enable features like single sign-on (SSO) to ensure secure and seamless access.
Are there additional fees for using integrations?
Most of our native integrations are included as part of your Navan platform subscription, with no additional fees from Navan. Our goal is to provide a powerful, connected ecosystem out of the box. Please note that some third-party applications may have their own subscription or usage fees that are independent of Navan.
Ready to see Navan in action?
Learn how Navan integrations can automate workflows and provide a real-time view across your business. Schedule a demo today.
Go to Navan →

analysis.name: Navan
analysis.value_proposition: An AI-powered all-in-one business travel and expense management platform that eliminates platform fees for travel while automating expense reporting from booking to reconciliation.
analysis.ideal_customer: Finance teams, travel managers, and executive assistants at companies with 10–10,000+ employees who need unified T&E management with policy controls and ERP integration.

features.name: flight booking
features.description: Book domestic and international flights from a global inventory with exclusive rates
features.evidence_quote: Global travel inventory and exclusive rates

features.name: hotel booking
features.description: Book hotels from global inventory within company spend policies
features.evidence_quote: travelers can book flights, hotels, car rentals, and trains on Navan

features.name: car rental booking
features.description: Book car rentals through Navan's global inventory
features.evidence_quote: travelers can book flights, hotels, car rentals, and trains on Navan

features.name: train booking
features.description: Book rail travel through Navan's global inventory
features.evidence_quote: travelers can book flights, hotels, car rentals, and trains on Navan

features.name: policy and approval workflows
features.description: Unlimited configurable spend policies and approval chains for travel bookings
features.evidence_quote: Unlimited policy and approval workflows

features.name: travel spend guardrails
features.description: Set spend limits so employees automatically stay within policy when booking
features.evidence_quote: Set spend guardrails so everyone stays within policy

features.name: self-serve travel changes
features.description: Travelers can modify or cancel bookings without agent assistance
features.evidence_quote: Self-serve changes and 24/7 travel support agents

features.name: 24/7 travel support
features.description: Round-the-clock human travel agent support for changes and emergencies
features.evidence_quote: Self-serve changes and 24/7 travel support agents

features.name: navan rewards
features.description: Loyalty rewards program letting travelers earn points redeemable for personal travel
features.evidence_quote: Navan Rewards program

features.name: customizable reports
features.description: Configurable reporting on travel and spend data
features.evidence_quote: Customizable reports

features.name: hris integrations
features.description: 30+ integrations with HR systems for user provisioning and employee data sync
features.evidence_quote: 30+ seamless HRIS integrations

features.name: expense management
features.description: End-to-end expense lifecycle management from submission to reconciliation
features.evidence_quote: Manage expenses and issue reimbursements

features.name: expense reimbursements
features.description: Issue employee reimbursements for out-of-pocket spend directly through Navan
features.evidence_quote: Manage expenses and issue reimbursements

features.name: corporate card integration
features.description: Connect existing Visa, Mastercard, or Amex corporate cards via Navan Connect
features.evidence_quote: Connect existing corporate or business credit cards

features.name: receipt scanning
features.description: Mobile receipt capture for on-the-go expense submission
features.evidence_quote: Receipt scanning for on-the-go expenses

features.name: erp integrations
features.description: Seamless integrations with major ERP systems for expense data sync
features.evidence_quote: Seamless integrations with most ERPs

features.name: expense auto-categorization
features.description: AI automatically categorizes every expense transaction
features.evidence_quote: Automatically categorize and reconcile every expense

features.name: real-time expense visibility
features.description: Live dashboard showing all company spend as it happens
features.evidence_quote: Get full visibility into every expense in real-time

features.name: out-of-policy transaction flagging
features.description: Automatically surfaces transactions that violate company policy for review
features.evidence_quote: Automatically flag out-of-policy transactions

features.name: navan corporate cards
features.description: Navan-issued corporate cards with built-in spend controls and virtual cards
features.evidence_quote: Optimize your T&E program for control and efficiency...Leverage Navan corporate cards

features.name: navan connect
features.description: Bring-your-own-card capability compatible with Visa, Mastercard, and Amex
features.evidence_quote: Navan Connect (compatible with Visa, Mastercard, and American Express corporate cards)

features.name: virtual cards
features.description: Automated virtual card issuance for built-in payment with travel bookings
features.evidence_quote: automated payments with built-in virtual cards

features.name: advanced analytics
features.description: Deep analytics on travel and expense program performance and savings
features.evidence_quote: Advanced Analytics

features.name: sustainability tracking
features.description: Track and report on corporate travel carbon footprint
features.evidence_quote: Sustainability

features.name: ai-powered spend insights
features.description: AI-driven recommendations and insights to optimize T&E spend
features.evidence_quote: Boost productivity and optimize savings with AI-powered insights

features.name: navan edge
features.description: Personal AI assistant for frequent travelers that personalizes booking and trip management
features.evidence_quote: The new standard for frequent travelers: tailored, rewarding, effortless

features.name: executive assistant tools
features.description: Dedicated booking experience for EAs managing exec travel with preference-first results
features.evidence_quote: Book the perfect trip — your exec's favorite travel options are shown first

features.name: itinerary email automation
features.description: Automatically generate and send itinerary emails after booking
features.evidence_quote: Automate itinerary emails, calendar syncing, and loyalty accumulation

differentiators: No platform fees for travel — Navan Travel is free for companies up to 300 employees
Study finds Navan saves customers 16% on business travel
96% CSAT and 43 NPS customer satisfaction scores
AI-powered platform across booking, expense, and intelligence
All-in-one T&E (travel + expense + payments) in a single platform
Navan Connect allows companies to bring their own Visa, Mastercard, or Amex corporate card
Travelers can earn Navan Rewards for personal travel from business trips
Powers 10,000+ companies including Canva, HelloFresh, DoorDash, Duolingo, and Steelcase
$7.6B in LTM gross booking volume demonstrating inventory leverage
77% of managers prioritize all-in-one T&E (implicit differentiation claim)

praised: "Navan just feels so much easier. It's super seamless."
"Booking through Navan makes our lives easier while saving the company money" — Amanda Kim, Commercial Accountant

free_tier.limits: Travel free for up to 300 employees; Expense free for first 5 monthly active expensing users

tiers.name: Navan Business
tiers.price_per_seat_per_month: $0 for travel; $15/user/month for expense beyond 5 users
tiers.headline_inclusions: Free travel for ≤300 employees, global inventory, unlimited policies, Navan Rewards, 30+ HRIS integrations, expense for first 5 users free

tiers.name: Navan Enterprise
tiers.headline_inclusions: Full Travel+Expense suite, unlimited users, global coverage, dedicated CSM, corporate negotiated rates, enterprise support

pricing.notes: Travel is commission-funded (no direct fee to company). Expense is free for first 5 monthly expensing users, then $15/user/month for Navan Business. Companies over 300 employees must contact sales for Enterprise pricing. Navan card issued by Celtic Bank (US), Stripe (EU/UK), and Adyen (EU/US/UK).
